title: Elsevier (standard artwork guidelines)
publisher: Elsevier (e.g. Computers & Geosciences, Environmental Modelling & Software)
notes: Elsevier artwork: line 1000 dpi, combination (halftone + line, e.g. a map) 500 dpi, halftone/photo 300 dpi. Single column ~90 mm, double column ~190 mm. Colour figures may be requested in CMYK -- cmocean is RGB, so export RGB and verify the CMYK proof.
